director.name: 弗朗西斯·普雷南特 Françoise Prenant

this_title: Sous le ciel lumineux de son pays natal
introduction: This takes place at, in, under, through the gashes of Beirut, in the dust of what remained of the city in 1995 – before the city centre, destroyed by the war, was razed and rebuilt.源自：https://www.cinemadureel.org/en/films/sous-le-ciel-lumineux-de-son-pays-natal-2/
chinese_title: Sous le ciel lumineux de son pays natal
